base_prompt: Write in a professional, polished, concise tone. Use only the provided context. Do not invent facts. Make the content suitable for a portfolio, LinkedIn summary, or professional profile.

sections.title: Professional Summary
sections.instruction: Summarize the person's background, technical direction, and career focus.

sections.title: Technical Experience
sections.instruction: Describe the professional and research experience mentioned in the resume.

sections.title: Projects and Skills
sections.instruction: Summarize key technical skills, frameworks, tools, and projects.
